### 🆕 Major New Intelligence in v4

#### ✅ BIS Entity List — CONFIRMED CLEAR
The March 28, 2025 Federal Register action (FR Doc 2025-05426) added 19 Pakistani entities. All are **nuclear or ballistic missile program** entities:

| Category | Entities |
|---|---|
| **Nuclear (12)** | Britlite Engineering, Indentech International, IntraLink, Proc-Master, Rehman Engineering & Services, The Sadidians, Sine Technologies, Supply Source Co., Ariston Trade Links, Professional Systems Pvt, RASTEK Technologies, NA Enterprises |
| **Ballistic Missile (7)** | Allied Business Concerns, Global Traders, Linkers Automation, Otto Manufacturing, Potohar Industrial & Trading, Rachna Supplies, Resource Enterprises |

**Agro China Pakistan, Topsun Group, and all directors are NOT on the BIS Entity List.**

#### ✅ CWC Chemical Screen — CONFIRMED CLEAR
| Chemical | CAS | CWC Status |
|---|---|---|
| Trichlorfon | 52-68-6 | **NOT scheduled** (Sched. 1/2/3 verified) |
| Phoxim | 14816-18-3 | **NOT scheduled** |
| Toluene (HS 27073000) | 108-88-3 | **NOT scheduled** |
| Quizalofop-P-Ethyl | — | **NOT scheduled** |

#### ✅ DPP Products Confirmed (kissanghar.pk)
| Product | Active Ingredients | Type | CWC |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Trioxim 50EC** | Trichlorfon 25% + Phoxim 25% | Insecticide | ✅ CLEAR |
| **Gap 22SC** | Quizalofop-P-Ethyl 5.6% + Fomesafen 15.2% | Herbicide | ✅ CLEAR |

**Toluene use explained**: Trioxim 50EC is an **EC (Emulsifiable Concentrate)** formulation — EC formulations require aromatic hydrocarbon solvents (toluene, xylene). HS 27073000 imports are legitimate formulation solvents.
